name: sprint-intelligence-data
description: GitHub data pipeline for sprint intelligence research

scripts.all: python scripts/ingest.py golang go --diffs --pr-diff-limit 1000 && python scripts/ingest.py rust-lang rust --diffs --pr-diff-limit 1000 && python scripts/ingest.py torvalds linux --diffs --pr-diff-limit 500
scripts.all:14d: python scripts/ingest.py golang go --diffs --days 14 --pr-diff-limit 200 && python scripts/ingest.py rust-lang rust --diffs --days 14 --pr-diff-limit 200 && python scripts/ingest.py torvalds linux --diffs --days 14 --pr-diff-limit 100
